THEVOID-BLIND_POWER.description: Attacks are [gold]X%[/gold] less accurate, where X is the number of [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-BLIND_POWER.title: Blind
THEVOID-LAST_GASP_POWER.description: On death, draw [gold]X[/gold] cards, where X is the number of [gold]Last Gasp[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-LAST_GASP_POWER.title: Last Gasp
THEVOID-VOID_PULSE_POWER.description: On death, gain [gold]X[/gold] [gold]Energy[/gold], where X is the number of [gold]Void Pulse[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-VOID_PULSE_POWER.title: Void Pulse
THEVOID-VOID_MEND_POWER.description: On death, heal [gold]X[/gold] HP, where X is the number of [gold]Void Mend[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-VOID_MEND_POWER.title: Void Mend
THEVOID-VOID_FLASH_POWER.description: On death, apply [gold]X Blind[/gold], where X is the number of [gold]Void Flash[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-VOID_FLASH_POWER.title: Void Flash
THEVOID-FADE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and apply [gold]X Blind[/gold] to yourself, where X is the number of [gold]Fade[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-FADE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of each turn gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to yourself.
THEVOID-FADE_POWER.title: Fade
THEVOID-VOID_SIGHT_POWER.title: Void Sight
THEVOID-BLOOD_RITE_POWER.title: Blood Rite
THEVOID-BLOOD_RITE_UPGRADED_POWER.descri: Whenever you lose HP, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw 1 card.
THEVOID-BLOOD_RITE_UPGRADED_POWER.smartD: Whenever you lose HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
THEVOID-BLOOD_RITE_UPGRADED_POWER.title: Blood Rite
THEVOID-VOID_ASCENDANT_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, apply 1 [gold]Void Mend[/gold] to ALL enemies. Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold] for every 5 [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks on ALL enemies.
THEVOID-VOID_ASCENDANT_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of each turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Void Mend[/gold] to ALL enemies. Gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold] for every 5 [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks on ALL enemies.
THEVOID-VOID_ASCENDANT_POWER.title: Void Ascendant
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_GAZE_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy dies, apply [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to all remaining enemies.
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_GAZE_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever an enemy dies, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to all remaining enemies.
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_GAZE_POWER.title: Abyssal Gaze
THEVOID-CONSUMPTION_POWER.description: Whenever [gold]Consumption[/gold] reaches [blue]0[/blue], die. Each turn [gold]Consumption[/gold] is decreased by [blue]1[/blue].
THEVOID-CONSUMPTION_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever [gold]Consumption[/gold] reaches [blue]0[/blue], die. Each turn [gold]Consumption[/gold] is decreased by [blue]1[/blue].
THEVOID-CONSUMPTION_POWER.title: Consumption
THEVOID-VOID_CLAIMED_POWER.title: Void Claimed
